# ZROKY file-size lint whitelist (Rule 3 — ZROKY-Q1-90DAY-PLAN.md)
#
# Files listed here exceed the 30 KB limit but are accepted until their
# split ticket ships. When the split lands, DELETE the entry — that's the
# proof the ticket is done.
#
# Format: one POSIX-relative path per line (from repo root). Comments on same
# line after the path are ignored.
#
# Adding a NEW entry requires a ticket reference comment.
# Entries with no matching file produce a stale-whitelist warning (non-failing).

# ── Q1 Sprint 1–2 splits (deadline: Week 6) ──────────────────────────────────

# ── Q2 split queue (pre-existing tech debt; DO NOT add new siblings) ─────────
zroky-backend/app/api/routes/analytics.py     # ZROKY-Q2-201 — split by sub-domain
zroky-backend/app/worker/tasks.py             # ZROKY-Q2-202 — split by worker domain
zroky-backend/app/api/routes/owner.py         # ZROKY-Q2-203 — split by sub-resource
zroky-backend/app/services/fix_adoption.py    # ZROKY-Q2-204 — split metrics / tracking
zroky-backend/app/db/models.py                # ZROKY-Q2-205 — split by ORM domain module
zroky-backend/app/api/routes/settings.py      # ZROKY-Q2-206 — split by sub-route
zroky-backend/app/api/routes/diagnosis.py     # ZROKY-Q2-207 — split by sub-resource
zroky-backend/app/api/routes/auth.py          # ZROKY-Q2-208 — split oauth / password / session
zroky-backend/app/api/routes/ingest.py        # ZROKY-Q2-209 — split intake / enrichment
zroky-sdk/zroky/_async.py                     # ZROKY-Q2-210 — split queue / batcher / flusher
zroky-backend/app/services/replay_executor.py # ZROKY-Q2-211 - split replay modes / comparison / persistence
zroky-backend/app/services/judge_engine.py    # ZROKY-Q2-212 - split provider client / rubric / verdict serialization
zroky-backend/app/api/routes/calls.py         # ZROKY-Q2-213 - split list / detail / trace tree / golden actions
zroky-backend/app/services/replay_runs.py     # ZROKY-Q2-214 - split create / quota / promotion / summaries
